sigWerErrors.reason: '提' (raise) and '起' (rise/start) are different verbs; the substitution changes the intended action and meaning of the sentence.
Omitting '我' (I) removes the subject of the sentence, making it unclear who is performing the action.
'信' (credit) and '心' (heart) are completely different words, changing the meaning of the noun phrase from 'credit card' to something nonsensical.
